name: dependabot-consolidation-pr-cleanup
description: Inventory Dependabot PRs, classify compatible updates, consolidate them into one governed PR, validate lockfiles, merge, and clean only run-owned source PRs and branches.

acceptance.description: All in-scope Dependabot PRs and source branches are inventoried at a fresh remote revision, including package manager, base branch, checks, linked updates, and ownership.
Every candidate is classified as consolidate, keep separate, defer, or exclude with an evidence-backed reason; no candidate is silently dropped.
The compatibility matrix proves which selected updates can share one consolidation change, including peer, runtime, package-manager, security, and ordering constraints.
The consolidation diff contains only selected Dependabot updates and required manifests or lockfiles; unrelated source changes are rejected.
Every applicable package-manager lockfile is regenerated and validated with repository-native install, lint, typecheck, test, and audit gates.
The consolidation PR is merged only from the current reviewed revision with passing required checks, and the provider reports a terminal merged state.
Only run-owned source Dependabot PRs, branches, and temporary artifacts are closed or deleted after merge; uncertain ownership or provider state fails closed.
